description.en: Closes the connection, if any, and sets thereadyStateattribute toCLOSED. If the connection is already closed, the method does nothing.

excerpt.es: Closes the connection, if any, and sets thereadyStateattribute toCLOSED. If the connection is already closed, the method does nothing.
